entry.name: apiKey
entry.label: Persistent API key generated in MyCalBook settings

entry.name: maxEvents
entry.label: Maximum number of upcoming events to show

entry.name: refreshIntervalMinutes
entry.label: How often to refresh the event list, in minutes

entry.name: backgroundOpacity
entry.label: Widget background opacity, 0-100. 100 keeps the standard Plasma frame; lower values remove the frame and paint a translucent background.

entry.name: useCustomTextColor
entry.label: Override the active Plasma colour scheme for the widget's text colour.

entry.name: customTextColor
entry.label: Hex colour to use for text when useCustomTextColor is enabled.
